title: nephrodium sorbifolium
intro: Nephrodium sorbifolium, also known as the False Ostrich Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium sorbifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
